message:
feat(google): add doctor and self_check message routing to Google connectors

Wire up doctor and self_check protocol messages in the main dispatch
loop for google-chat, google-docs, google-sheets, and
google-workspace-events connectors.

Also:
- vectordb: add fcp-sdk dependency and ConnectorRuntime lifecycle
- google-calendar: relax rate-limit test assertion for RetryLoop compat
- Cargo.lock: update dependency graph

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,6 +87,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut ChatConnector, message: &str) -> serde_j
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
